overrides.expect: \left. \begin{array}{l} \text {Calling sequence: JMP MAXIMUM.} \\ \text {Entry conditions: rI1 = n; assume that n\geq 1.} \\ \text {Exit conditions: rA = max _ {1\leq k\leq n} CONTENTS (X + k) = CONTENTS (X + rI2);} \\ \text {rI3 = 0; rJ and CI are also affected.} \end{array} \right\}
overrides.new: \left. \begin{array}{l} \text{Calling sequence: JMP MAXIMUM.} \\ \text{Entry conditions: rI1 = n; assume that } n\geq 1. \\ \text{Exit conditions: } rA = \max_{1\leq k\leq n} \text{ CONTENTS } (X + k) = \text{ CONTENTS } (X + rI2); \\ \text{rI3 = 0; rJ and CI are also affected.} \end{array} \right\}

overrides.expect: \prod_ {R (j)} a _ {j} = \sum_ {R (j)} (\log_ {b} a _ {j}) _ {\text {, assuming that all a_{j} >0}}.
overrides.new: \prod_{R(j)} a_{j} = \sum_{R(j)} (\log_{b} a_{j})_{\text{, assuming that all } a_{j} >0}.

overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \mathrm{Y} \Leftarrow \mathrm{X} (\text { delete   from   stack }): \left\{ \begin{array}{l} \text { if   T = 0,then   UNDERFLOW;} \\ \mathrm{Y} \leftarrow \mathrm{X} [ \mathrm{T} ]; \\ \mathrm{T} \leftarrow \mathrm{T} - 1. \end{array} \right. (3a) \\ \mathrm{X} \Leftarrow \mathrm{Y} (\text {insert into queue}): \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \text {if } R = M, \text { then } R\leftarrow 1, \text { otherwise } R\leftarrow R + 1; \\ \text {if R = F, then OVERFLOW;} \\ \mathrm{X}[\mathrm{R}] \leftarrow \mathrm{Y}. \end{array} \right. (6a) \\ \mathrm{Y} \Leftarrow \mathrm{X} (\text {delete from queue}): \left\{ \begin{array}{l} \text {if F = R, then UNDERFLOW;} \\ \text {if } F = M, \text { then } F\leftarrow 1, \text { otherwise } F\leftarrow F + 1; \\ \mathrm{Y} \leftarrow \mathrm{X} [ \mathrm{F} ]. \end{array} \right. (7 a) \\ \end{array}
